vocab.meaning: một cách để giải tỏa sức sáng tạo
vocab.example: Oil painting acts as a creative release for me, allowing me to express emotions that are hard to put into words.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn sau một ngày dài
vocab.example: I find that playing the guitar is the perfect way to unwind after a long day at the office.

vocab.meaning: thử làm một việc gì đó (thường là lần đầu)
vocab.example: I’ve always wanted to have a crack at archery, as it requires an incredible amount of focus and discipline.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm hiểu biết/kiến thức
vocab.example: Traveling to remote villages is my favorite hobby because it truly helps to broaden my horizons and challenge my assumptions.

vocab.meaning: giúp ai đó luôn nhạy bén/tập trung
vocab.example: Competitive chess is great because it really keeps me on my toes and sharpens my strategic thinking.

vocab.meaning: một sở thích nhất thời/ngắn ngủi
vocab.example: I once had a fleeting interest in knitting, but I quickly realized I didn't have the patience for it.

vocab.meaning: đắm mình vào điều gì đó
vocab.example: On weekends, I like to immerse myself in nature by going on long, solitary hikes in the mountains.

vocab.meaning: tìm thấy sự an ủi/bình yên trong...
vocab.example: During stressful periods, I find solace in classical literature; there's something very grounding about the classics.

vocab.meaning: rất tự hào về điều gì
vocab.example: I take great pride in my small balcony garden, especially when the flowers finally start to bloom in spring.

vocab.meaning: quên hết thời gian (do quá say mê)
vocab.example: Whenever I start coding a new personal project, I completely lose track of time and can work until dawn.
